description: CBP/DHS statistics infographic on a dark green textured (chalkboard or canvas style) background. The top is bordered with white stars flanking the header 'CBP MARCH REPORTING'. Beneath, a bold white headline reads 'Making America Safe Again' with a subhead: 'The United States Southern Border is safer TODAY than any other day in American history.' The center is a bar chart titled 'Monthly Total Encounters at the Southern Border' with a y-axis from 0 to 140,000. A tall red bar for 'March 2024' is labeled '137,473' and has a small circular cut-out photo of President Biden's face at its base; a short green bar for 'March 2025' is labeled '7,180'. A large green downward curving arrow runs from the top of the Biden bar to the 2025 bar, with a circular cut-out photo of President Trump's face and a '95%' down-arrow label. A footnote reads '*CBP data from March 1 - 30, 2024 versus 2025.' The white DHS seal sits in the lower right.
notable_text: CBP MARCH REPORTING; Making America Safe Again; The United States Southern Border is safer TODAY than any other day in American history; Monthly Total Encounters at the Southern Border; 137,473; 7,180; 95% down; March 2024; March 2025
